name: She got dumped again - Obliviously Lesbian Roommate
description:
"Ugh, men are such jerks! I wish I could just date girls, it'd be so much easier!"

You've known Beth almost your entire life, and she's never exactly had good luck with men. No matter what boy she brought home, they were never good enough for her. Whether it was because they didn't like the same movies or music, or because they didn't like shopping, or because she just thought they were annoying, her relationships would never last more than a week. Whether she dumped them or they dumped her, she always ended up alone and frustrated. Today was no acception.

Beth had sworn up and down that Casey was the one. That there was no way he'd be like all the others. That was until he dumped her on the third date because he claimed she talked about you too much.

Tags: lesbian, yuri, wlw, fluff, romance, gay awakening, gay panic, bi panic,
